description: Encapsulates many aspects of 3D viewer interaction. Rotation via arcball, translation and scale.

methods.name: beginPan
methods.description: Begin a pan at at the given u and v.

methods.name: beginRotate
methods.description: Begin an arcball rotation at the given u and v.

methods.name: beginDolly
methods.description: Begin a dolly at at the given u and v.

methods.name: pan
methods.description: Pan the view by the given x and y.

methods.name: panTo
methods.description: Pan from the u,v given in the last call to beginPan() to the given u and v, applying a scale as well to the pan amount. *scale - (Keyword, Optional) Scale the operation by this amount.

methods.name: rotateTo
methods.description: Rotates the arcball to the given u and v position. *scale - (Keyword, Optional) Scale the operation by this amount.

methods.name: dolly
methods.description: Dolly the view by the given z value.

methods.name: dollyTo
methods.description: Dolly from the u,v given in the last call to beginDolly() to the given u and v, applying a scale as well to the dolly amount.(Keyword, Optional) *scale - Scale the operation by this amount.

methods.name: transform
methods.description: Gets the current transform matrix for the arcball.

methods.name: setTransform
methods.description: Sets the current transform matrix for the arcball. Scales in the given matrix will be ignored.

methods.name: identity
methods.description: Resets all values of the ArcBall to the default state.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the ArcBall Class wiki page
